Calculation.Text: Let ( [ image =PatternCount ( mediafile ; ".jpg" ) Or PatternCount ( mediafile ; ".jpeg" ) Or PatternCount ( mediafile ; ".png" ) Or PatternCount ( mediafile ; ".svg" ) Or PatternCount ( mediafile ; ".gif" ) Or PatternCount ( mediafile ; ".webp" ); video = PatternCount ( mediafile ; ".mp4" ); sound = PatternCount ( mediafile ; ".mp3" ); subtitle = PatternCount ( mediafile ; ".vtt" ); pdf = PatternCount ( mediafile ; ".pdf" ); json = PatternCount ( mediafile ; ".json" ); isKnownFileType = image Or video Or sound Or subtitle Or pdf Or json; Other = Not isKnownFileType ] ; If ( image ; "content/images/"; If (video Or subtitle ; "content/videos/"; If (sound ; "content/sounds/"; If (pdf ; "content/pdf/"; If (json ; "content/json/"; If ( Other ; "content/files/" )))))) )
